message.pocketrepose.need_key: This suitcase needs an activated Keystone. Rename a Keystone in an anvil, then right-click it to activate.
message.pocketrepose.not_linked: This suitcase isn't linked yet. Link it with an activated Keystone first.
message.pocketrepose.recursion_disabled: You can't open a suitcase from inside a pocket dimension.
message.pocketrepose.key_needs_name: Rename this Keystone in an anvil before activating it.
message.pocketrepose.entry_set: Entry point set for this pocket dimension.
message.pocketrepose.suitcase_full: This suitcase is already carrying a creature.
tooltip.pocketrepose.unbound: Rename in an anvil, then right-click to activate
command.pocketrepose.reset_entry: Pocket Repose: entry point reset for dimension '%s'
